---
title: "Graph Patterns"
subtitle: "A list of common CIDOC CRM graph patterns"
---

## Graph Patterns

This page lists common graph patterns that we encounter when modelling data in LINCS.

## General Patterns

### Names & Titles

### Type

### Event Date

### Event Location

![Caption](./images/Location.png)

## Patterns Involving People

### Birth Date

### Birth Place

![Caption](./images/Birth_Location.png)

### Death Date

### Death Place

![Caption](./images/Death_Location.png)

### Occupation


## Patterns Involving Groups


## Patterns Involving Places



### Other useful commands
